title: geum peruvianum
intro: Geum peruvianum, also known as Peruvian Avens, is a perennial herb native to the Andean region of South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Geum peruvianum include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to reduce the risk of certain cancers. Geum peruvianum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal dosages.
